title: MoPOP: Museum of Pop Culture (Seattle) - Visitor Information & Reviews
content: ## MoPOP: Museum of Pop Culture and its collection. 5. Current: MoPOP: Museum of Pop Culture. # MoPOP: Museum of Pop Culture. The Museum of Pop Culture, or MoPOP, is a cultural center located in the Seattle Center in the United States. This change in name reflects the museum's broadened focus on all aspects of pop culture, beyond just music and science fiction. ### Science Fiction Museum and Hall of Fame. In 2004, the Science Fiction Museum and Hall of Fame was inaugurated in the South wing of the Museum of Pop Culture building. This addition was made to compensate for the lack of revenue and has since become an integral part of the museum, offering visitors a chance to explore the world of science fiction. ITExperience Music Project and Science Fiction Museum and Hall of Fame. ### Images of MoPOP: Museum of Pop Culture. The Museum of Pop Culture (MoPOP) in Seattle offers an engaging experience for fans of music, movies, and pop culture.

title: Museum of Pop Culture - Seattle - Tripadvisor
content: Most guests suggest spending 1-3 hours to fully enjoy the museum, with morning visits recommended for smaller crowds. Pop culture enthusiasts, especially adults

title: MUSEUM OF POP CULTURE - Updated June 2026 - Yelp
content: Took a day trip to visit the museum of pop culture and I enjoyed it overall. I spent majority of my time in the horror section "sacred to death" underground

title: MoPOP worth it? : r/SeattleWA - Reddit
content: It's a great museum. I enjoy seeing the guitars of famous musicians. It's curated very well and very interactive. I think there's something there for everyone.

title: Mother-Daughter Review: MoPop's Massive is Meta - Seattle's Child
content: MoPop is a massive tourist attraction but a perfect staycation activity. It is open from 10 am to 5 pm, six days a week, and closed Wednesdays.
